notes: Configurable code editor in Settings (VS Code, Cursor, Sublime Text, Custom)
Auto-detection shows installed editors with green/red indicators
Custom command support for any editor (nvim, neovide, etc)
Fixed Windows path prefix issue when opening editors
Git sync operations (push, pull, merge, full sync)
GitHub token management with secure OS credential storage
Advanced git features (branches, stashes, tags, cherry-pick)
Analytics dashboard with commit history and heatmap
